acds_client.h(3) Library Functions Manual acds_client.h(3)

NAME

acds_client.h - ACIP client-side protocol library and ACDS client connection API.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct acds_client_config_t
ACDS client connection configuration. struct acds_client_t
ACDS client connection handle. struct acds_session_create_params_t
Session creation request parameters. struct acds_session_create_result_t
Session creation result. struct acds_session_lookup_result_t
Session lookup result. struct acds_session_join_params_t
Session join parameters. struct acds_session_join_result_t
Session join result.

Typedefs


typedef bool(* parallel_connect_should_exit_fn) (void *user_data)

Functions


asciichat_error_t acds_client_connect (acds_client_t *client, const acds_client_config_t *config)
Connect to ACDS server. void acds_client_disconnect (acds_client_t *client)
Disconnect from ACDS server. asciichat_error_t acds_session_create (acds_client_t *client, const acds_session_create_params_t *params, acds_session_create_result_t *result)
Create a new session on the discovery server. asciichat_error_t acds_session_lookup (acds_client_t *client, const char *session_string, acds_session_lookup_result_t *result)
Look up session by string. asciichat_error_t acds_session_join (acds_client_t *client, const acds_session_join_params_t *params, acds_session_join_result_t *result)
Join an existing session. asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_create (const uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, uint8_t signature_out[64])
Sign a SESSION_CREATE message. asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_create (const uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, const uint8_t signature[64])
Verify SESSION_CREATE signature. asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_join (const uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, const char *session_string, uint8_t signature_out[64])
Sign a SESSION_JOIN message. asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_join (const uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, const char *session_string, const uint8_t signature[64])
Verify SESSION_JOIN signature. bool acds_validate_timestamp (uint64_t timestamp_ms, uint32_t window_seconds)
Check if timestamp is within acceptable window. void acds_client_config_init_defaults (acds_client_config_t *config)
Initialize ACDS client configuration with defaults.

Detailed Description

ACIP client-side protocol library and ACDS client connection API.

Definition in file acds_client.h.

Typedef Documentation

typedef bool(* parallel_connect_should_exit_fn) (void *user_data)

Definition at line 104 of file acds_client.h.

Function Documentation

void acds_client_config_init_defaults (acds_client_config_t * config)

Initialize ACDS client configuration with defaults. Sets default values:

  • server_address: "127.0.0.1"
  • server_port: 27225
  • timeout_ms: 5000

Parameters

Config Module Configuration to initialize

Definition at line 46 of file acds_client.c.

46                                                                     {
47   if (!config) {
48     return;
49   }
50 
51   memset(config, 0, sizeof(*config));
52   SAFE_STRNCPY(config->server_address, "127.0.0.1", sizeof(config->server_address));
53   config->server_port = ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT;
54   config->timeout_ms = 5 * MS_PER_SEC_INT;
55 }




References ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT,
    MS_PER_SEC_INT, SAFE_STRNCPY,
    acds_client_config_t::server_address,
    acds_client_config_t::server_port, and
    acds_client_config_t::timeout_ms.


Referenced by client_crypto_init(), and
    server_main().






asciichat_error_t acds_client_connect
  (acds_client_t * client, const acds_client_config_t *
  config)


Connect to ACDS server. Establishes TCP connection to the
    discovery server.




Parameters


client Client handle (output)


Config Module Connection configuration


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 61 of file acds_client.c.


61                                                                                                  {
62   if (!client || !config) {
63     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "client or config is NULL");
64   }
65 
66   memset(client, 0, sizeof(*client));
67   memcpy(&client->config, config, sizeof(acds_client_config_t));
68   client->socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE;
69   client->connected = false;
70 
71   // Resolve server address (supports both hostnames and IP addresses, IPv4 and IPv6)
72   struct addrinfo hints;
73   struct addrinfo *result = NULL;
74   memset(&hints, 0, sizeof(hints));
75   hints.ai_family = AF_UNSPEC;     // IPv4 or IPv6
76   hints.ai_socktype = SOCK_STREAM; // TCP
77 
78   char port_str[16];
79   safe_snprintf(port_str, sizeof(port_str), "%d", config->server_port);
80 
81   log_debug("ACDS: Resolving address '%s:%s'...", config->server_address, port_str);
82   int gai_result = getaddrinfo(config->server_address, port_str, &hints, &result);
83   if (gai_result != 0) {
84     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to resolve server address '%s': %s", config->server_address,
85                      gai_strerror(gai_result));
86   }
87   log_debug("ACDS: Address resolved successfully");
88   freeaddrinfo(result);
89 
90   // Use parallel_connect to attempt IPv4 and IPv6 connections concurrently
91   parallel_connect_config_t pconn_config = {
92       .hostname = config->server_address,
93       .port = config->server_port,
94       .timeout_ms = config->timeout_ms,
95       .should_exit_callback = config->should_exit_callback,
96       .callback_data = config->callback_data,
97   };
98 
99   asciichat_error_t pconn_result = parallel_connect(&pconn_config, &client->socket);
100   if (pconn_result == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
101     client->connected = true;
102 
103     /* Register ACDS client with named registry */
104     char acds_name[64];
105     snprintf(acds_name, sizeof(acds_name), "acds_client:%s:%d", config->server_address, config->server_port);
106     NAMED_REGISTER(client, acds_name, "acds_client_t", "0x%tx", NULL);
107 
108     log_info("Connected to ACDS server at %s:%d", config->server_address, config->server_port);
109     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
110   }
111 
112   return pconn_result;
113 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    acds_client_config_t::callback_data, acds_client_t::config,
    acds_client_t::connected, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK, INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, log_debug,
    log_info, NAMED_REGISTER, parallel_connect(),
    safe_snprintf(), acds_client_config_t::server_address,
    acds_client_config_t::server_port, SET_ERRNO,
    acds_client_config_t::should_exit_callback,
    acds_client_t::socket, and
  acds_client_config_t::timeout_ms.


Referenced by client_crypto_init(), and
    server_main().






void
  acds_client_disconnect (acds_client_t * client)


Disconnect from ACDS server. Closes the connection and cleans up
    resources.




Parameters


client Client handle


Definition at line 115 of file acds_client.c.


115                                                    {
116   if (!client) {
117     return;
118   }
119 
120   if (client->socket != INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE) {
121     socket_close(client->socket);
122     client->socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE;
123   }
124 
125   client->connected = false;
126   log_debug("Disconnected from ACDS server");
127 }






References acds_client_t::connected,
    INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, log_debug, acds_client_t::socket,
    and socket_close().


Referenced by client_crypto_init(), and
    server_main().






asciichat_error_t acds_session_create
  (acds_client_t * client, const acds_session_create_params_t *
  params, acds_session_create_result_t * result)


Create a new session on the discovery server. Sends SESSION_CREATE
    packet and receives SESSION_CREATED response.




Parameters


client Connected ACDS client


params Session creation parameters


result Session creation result (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 133 of file acds_client.c.


134                                                                             {
135   if (!client || !params || !result) {
136     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
137   }
138 
139   if (!client->connected) {
140     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Not connected to ACDS server");
141   }
142 
143   // Build SESSION_CREATE payload
144   acip_session_create_t req;
145   memset(&req, 0, sizeof(req));
146 
147   memcpy(req.identity_pubkey, params->identity_pubkey, 32);
148 
149   // Sign the request: type || timestamp || capabilities
150   uint64_t timestamp = (uint64_t)time(NULL) * 1000; // Unix ms
151   req.timestamp = timestamp;
152   req.capabilities = params->capabilities;
153   req.max_participants = params->max_participants;
154 
155   // Generate Ed25519 signature for identity verification
156   asciichat_error_t sign_result = acds_sign_session_create(params->identity_seckey, timestamp, params->capabilities,
157                                                            params->max_participants, req.signature);
158   if (sign_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
159     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Failed to sign SESSION_CREATE request");
160   }
161 
162   req.has_password = params->has_password ? 1 : 0;
163   if (params->has_password) {
164     // Hash password with Argon2id using libsodium
165     // crypto_pwhash_str produces a null-terminated ASCII string
166     if (crypto_pwhash_str((char *)req.password_hash, params->password, strlen(params->password),
167                           crypto_pwhash_OPSLIMIT_INTERACTIVE, crypto_pwhash_MEMLIMIT_INTERACTIVE) != 0) {
168       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Failed to hash password (out of memory)");
169     }
170   } else {
171     memset(req.password_hash, 0, sizeof(req.password_hash));
172   }
173 
174   req.reserved_string_len = 0; // Auto-generate
175   if (params->reserved_string && params->reserved_string[0] != '\0') {
176     req.reserved_string_len = strlen(params->reserved_string);
177     // Variable part would follow here (not implemented yet)
178   }
179 
180   // Server connection information
181   SAFE_STRNCPY(req.server_address, params->server_address, sizeof(req.server_address));
182   req.server_port = params->server_port;
183 
184   // IP disclosure policy
185   // Auto-detection: If password is set, IP will be revealed after verification
186   // If no password, require explicit opt-in via acds_expose_ip
187   req.expose_ip_publicly = params->acds_expose_ip ? 1 : 0;
188 
189   // Session type (Direct TCP or WebRTC)
190   req.session_type = params->session_type;
191 
192   // Multi-key protocol: set to single-key mode (total_keys=0 for backward compatibility, or =1 for new protocol)
193   // For now, using legacy single-key mode (total_keys=0, key_index=0)
194   req.total_keys = 0;  // Legacy mode: server knows this is single-key
195   req.key_index = 0;   // Not used in legacy mode
196 
197   // Send SESSION_CREATE packet
198   asciichat_error_t send_result = send_packet(client->socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE, &req, sizeof(req));
199   if (send_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
200     return send_result;
201   }
202 
203   log_debug("Sent SESSION_CREATE request");
204   log_debug("★ ACDS_CLIENT: About to receive SESSION_CREATED on socket %d", client->socket);
205 
206   // Receive SESSION_CREATED response
207   packet_type_t resp_type;
208   void *resp_payload = NULL;
209   size_t resp_size = 0;
210 
211   int recv_result = receive_packet(client->socket, &resp_type, &resp_payload, &resp_size);
212   log_debug("★ ACDS_CLIENT: receive_packet returned %d", recv_result);
213   if (recv_result < 0) {
214     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to receive SESSION_CREATED response");
215   }
216 
217   // Check response type
218   if (resp_type != PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATED) {
219     if (resp_type == PACKET_TYPE_ERROR_MESSAGE || resp_type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_ERROR) {
220       log_error("Session creation failed: server returned error packet");
221       buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
222       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Session creation failed");
223     }
224     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
225     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Unexpected response type: 0x%02X", resp_type);
226   }
227 
228   // Parse SESSION_CREATED response
229   if (resp_size < sizeof(acip_session_created_t)) {
230     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
231     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "SESSION_CREATED response too small: %zu bytes", resp_size);
232   }
233 
234   acip_session_created_t *resp = (acip_session_created_t *)resp_payload;
235 
236   // Copy session string (null-terminate)
237   size_t string_len = resp->session_string_len < sizeof(result->session_string) - 1
238                           ? resp->session_string_len
239                           : sizeof(result->session_string) - 1;
240   memcpy(result->session_string, resp->session_string, string_len);
241   result->session_string[string_len] = '\0';
242 
243   memcpy(result->session_id, resp->session_id, 16);
244   result->expires_at = resp->expires_at;
245 
246   log_info("Session created: %s (expires at %llu)", result->session_string, (unsigned long long)result->expires_at);
247 
248   buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
249   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
250 }






References acds_session_create_params_t::acds_expose_ip,
    acds_sign_session_create(), acip_session_create_t,
    acip_session_created_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    buffer_pool_free(),
    acds_session_create_params_t::capabilities,
    acds_client_t::connected, ERROR_CRYPTO,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_NETWORK,
    acds_session_create_result_t::expires_at,
    acds_session_create_params_t::has_password,
    acds_session_create_params_t::identity_pubkey,

    acds_session_create_params_t::max_participants,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_ERROR, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATED, PACKET_TYPE_ERROR_MESSAGE,
    acds_session_create_params_t::password, receive_packet(),
    acds_session_create_params_t::reserved_string, SAFE_STRNCPY,

    acds_session_create_params_t::server_port,
    acds_session_create_result_t::session_id,

    acds_session_create_params_t::session_type, SET_ERRNO, and
    acds_client_t::socket.

asciichat_error_t acds_session_join (acds_client_t
  * client, const acds_session_join_params_t * params,
  acds_session_join_result_t * result)


Join an existing session. Sends SESSION_JOIN packet and receives
    SESSION_JOINED response.




Parameters


client Connected ACDS client


params Join parameters


result Join result (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 329 of file acds_client.c.


330                                                                         {
331   if (!client || !params || !result) {
332     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
333   }
334 
335   if (!client->connected) {
336     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Not connected to ACDS server");
337   }
338 
339   // Build SESSION_JOIN payload
340   acip_session_join_t req;
341   memset(&req, 0, sizeof(req));
342 
343   req.session_string_len = strlen(params->session_string);
344   if (req.session_string_len >= sizeof(req.session_string)) {
345     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long");
346   }
347 
348   memcpy(req.session_string, params->session_string, req.session_string_len);
349   memcpy(req.identity_pubkey, params->identity_pubkey, 32);
350 
351   // Sign the request: type || timestamp || session_string
352   uint64_t timestamp = (uint64_t)time(NULL) * 1000;
353   req.timestamp = timestamp;
354 
355   // Generate Ed25519 signature for identity verification
356   asciichat_error_t sign_result =
357       acds_sign_session_join(params->identity_seckey, timestamp, params->session_string, req.signature);
358   if (sign_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
359     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Failed to sign SESSION_JOIN request");
360   }
361 
362   req.has_password = params->has_password ? 1 : 0;
363   if (params->has_password) {
364     SAFE_STRNCPY(req.password, params->password, sizeof(req.password));
365   }
366 
367   // Send SESSION_JOIN packet
368   asciichat_error_t send_result = send_packet(client->socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN, &req, sizeof(req));
369   if (send_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
370     return send_result;
371   }
372 
373   log_debug("Sent SESSION_JOIN request for '%s'", params->session_string);
374 
375   // Receive SESSION_JOINED response
376   packet_type_t resp_type;
377   void *resp_payload = NULL;
378   size_t resp_size = 0;
379 
380   int recv_result = receive_packet(client->socket, &resp_type, &resp_payload, &resp_size);
381   if (recv_result < 0) {
382     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to receive SESSION_JOINED response");
383   }
384 
385   if (resp_type != PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOINED) {
386     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
387     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Unexpected response type: 0x%02X", resp_type);
388   }
389 
390   if (resp_size < sizeof(acip_session_joined_t)) {
391     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
392     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "SESSION_JOINED response too small");
393   }
394 
395   acip_session_joined_t *resp = (acip_session_joined_t *)resp_payload;
396 
397   // Copy result
398   result->success = resp->success != 0;
399   if (result->success) {
400     memcpy(result->participant_id, resp->participant_id, 16);
401     memcpy(result->session_id, resp->session_id, 16);
402     // Server connection information (ONLY revealed after successful authentication)
403     result->session_type = resp->session_type;
404     SAFE_STRNCPY(result->server_address, resp->server_address, sizeof(result->server_address));
405     result->server_port = resp->server_port;
406     log_info("Joined session successfully (participant ID: %02x%02x..., server=%s:%d, type=%s)",
407              result->participant_id[0], result->participant_id[1], result->server_address, result->server_port,
408              result->session_type == SESSION_TYPE_WEBRTC ? "WebRTC" : "DirectTCP");
409   } else {
410     result->error_code = resp->error_code;
411     size_t msg_len = strnlen(resp->error_message, sizeof(resp->error_message));
412     if (msg_len >= sizeof(result->error_message)) {
413       msg_len = sizeof(result->error_message) - 1;
414     }
415     memcpy(result->error_message, resp->error_message, msg_len);
416     result->error_message[msg_len] = '\0';
417     log_warn("Failed to join session: %s (code %d)", result->error_message, result->error_code);
418   }
419 
420   buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
421   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
422 }

asciichat_error_t acds_session_lookup
  (acds_client_t * client, const char * session_string,
  acds_session_lookup_result_t * result)


Look up session by string. Sends SESSION_LOOKUP packet and
    receives SESSION_INFO response.




Parameters


client Connected ACDS client


session_string Session string to look up


result Lookup result (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 252 of file acds_client.c.


253                                                                             {
254   if (!client || !session_string || !result) {
255     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
256   }
257 
258   if (!client->connected) {
259     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Not connected to ACDS server");
260   }
261 
262   // Build SESSION_LOOKUP payload
263   acip_session_lookup_t req;
264   memset(&req, 0, sizeof(req));
265 
266   req.session_string_len = strlen(session_string);
267   if (req.session_string_len >= sizeof(req.session_string)) {
268     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long");
269   }
270 
271   memcpy(req.session_string, session_string, req.session_string_len);
272 
273   // Send SESSION_LOOKUP packet
274   asciichat_error_t send_result = send_packet(client->socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_LOOKUP, &req, sizeof(req));
275   if (send_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
276     return send_result;
277   }
278 
279   log_debug("Sent SESSION_LOOKUP request for '%s'", session_string);
280 
281   // Receive SESSION_INFO response
282   packet_type_t resp_type;
283   void *resp_payload = NULL;
284   size_t resp_size = 0;
285 
286   int recv_result = receive_packet(client->socket, &resp_type, &resp_payload, &resp_size);
287   if (recv_result < 0) {
288     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to receive SESSION_INFO response");
289   }
290 
291   if (resp_type != PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_INFO) {
292     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
293     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Unexpected response type: 0x%02X", resp_type);
294   }
295 
296   if (resp_size < sizeof(acip_session_info_t)) {
297     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
298     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "SESSION_INFO response too small");
299   }
300 
301   acip_session_info_t *resp = (acip_session_info_t *)resp_payload;
302 
303   // Copy result
304   result->found = resp->found != 0;
305   if (result->found) {
306     memcpy(result->session_id, resp->session_id, 16);
307     memcpy(result->host_pubkey, resp->host_pubkey, 32);
308     result->capabilities = resp->capabilities;
309     result->max_participants = resp->max_participants;
310     result->current_participants = resp->current_participants;
311     result->has_password = resp->has_password != 0;
312     result->created_at = resp->created_at;
313     result->expires_at = resp->expires_at;
314     result->require_server_verify = resp->require_server_verify != 0;
315     result->require_client_verify = resp->require_client_verify != 0;
316 
317     log_info("Session found: %s (%d/%d participants, password=%s, policies: server_verify=%d client_verify=%d)",
318              session_string, result->current_participants, result->max_participants,
319              result->has_password ? "required" : "not required", result->require_server_verify,
320              result->require_client_verify);
321   } else {
322     log_info("Session not found: %s", session_string);
323   }
324 
325   buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
326   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
327 }

    acip_session_lookup_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,

    acds_session_lookup_result_t::capabilities,
    acds_client_t::connected,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::created_at,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::current_participants,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_NETWORK,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::expires_at,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::found,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::has_password,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::host_pubkey, log_debug,
    log_info, acds_session_lookup_result_t::max_participants,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_INFO,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_LOOKUP, receive_packet(),
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::require_client_verify,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::require_server_verify,
    send_packet(), acds_session_lookup_result_t::session_id,
    SET_ERRNO, and acds_client_t::socket.


Referenced by client_crypto_init().






asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_create (const
  uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t
  capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, uint8_t
  signature_out[64])


Sign a SESSION_CREATE message. Computes Ed25519 signature over:
    type || timestamp || capabilities || max_participants




Parameters


identity_seckey Ed25519 secret key (64 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


capabilities Capabilities bitfield


max_participants Maximum participants (1-8)


signature_out Output buffer for signature (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 428 of file acds_client.c.


429                                                                                                 {
430   if (!identity_seckey || !signature_out) {
431     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_sign_session_create");
432   }
433 
434   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || capabilities (1 byte) || max_participants (1 byte)
435   uint8_t message[11];
436   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE;
437 
438   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
439   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
440   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
441 
442   message[9] = capabilities;
443   message[10] = max_participants;
444 
445   // Sign using Ed25519
446   if (crypto_sign_detached(signature_out, NULL, message, sizeof(message), identity_seckey) != 0) {
447     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Ed25519 signature generation failed");
448   }
449 
450   log_debug("Generated SESSION_CREATE signature (timestamp=%llu, caps=%u, max=%u)", (unsigned long long)timestamp,
451             capabilities, max_participants);
452 
453   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
454 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, HOST_TO_NET_U64, log_debug,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by acds_session_create().






asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_join (const
  uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, const char *
  session_string, uint8_t signature_out[64])


Sign a SESSION_JOIN message. Computes Ed25519 signature over: type
    || timestamp || session_string




Parameters


identity_seckey Ed25519 secret key (64 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


session_string Session string (null-terminated)


signature_out Output buffer for signature (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 484 of file acds_client.c.


485                                                                                                 {
486   if (!identity_seckey || !session_string || !signature_out) {
487     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_sign_session_join");
488   }
489 
490   size_t session_len = strlen(session_string);
491   if (session_len > 48) {
492     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long (max 48 chars)");
493   }
494 
495   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || session_string (variable length)
496   uint8_t message[1 + 8 + 48];
497   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN;
498 
499   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
500   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
501   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
502 
503   // Copy session string (copy exactly session_len bytes, no null terminator in signature)
504   memcpy(&message[9], session_string, session_len);
505 
506   size_t message_len = 9 + session_len;
507 
508   // Sign using Ed25519
509   if (crypto_sign_detached(signature_out, NULL, message, message_len, identity_seckey) != 0) {
510     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Ed25519 signature generation failed");
511   }
512 
513   log_debug("Generated SESSION_JOIN signature (timestamp=%llu, session='%s')", (unsigned long long)timestamp,
514             session_string);
515 
516   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
517 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, HOST_TO_NET_U64, log_debug,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by acds_session_join().






bool acds_validate_timestamp (uint64_t
  timestamp_ms, uint32_t window_seconds)


Check if timestamp is within acceptable window. Validates
    timestamp is recent (within window_seconds of current time) and not in the
    future.




Parameters


timestamp_ms Unix milliseconds timestamp


window_seconds Acceptable age window (e.g., 300 for 5 minutes)


Returns


true if timestamp is valid, false if too old or in the
  future


Definition at line 553 of file acds_client.c.


553                                                                              {
554   uint64_t now_ms = time_ns_to_ms(time_get_realtime_ns());
555   uint64_t window_ms = (uint64_t)window_seconds * 1000;
556 
557   if (timestamp_ms > now_ms + 60000) {
558     int64_t skew = (int64_t)timestamp_ms - (int64_t)now_ms;
559     log_warn("Timestamp is in the future: %llu > %llu (skew: %lld ms)", (unsigned long long)timestamp_ms,
560              (unsigned long long)now_ms, (long long)skew);
561     return false;
562   }
563 
564   uint64_t min_valid_timestamp = (now_ms >= window_ms) ? (now_ms - window_ms) : 0;
565   if (timestamp_ms < min_valid_timestamp) {
566     int64_t age = (int64_t)now_ms - (int64_t)timestamp_ms;
567     log_warn("Timestamp is too old: %llu < %llu (age: %lld ms, max: %u seconds)", (unsigned long long)timestamp_ms,
568              (unsigned long long)min_valid_timestamp, (long long)age, window_seconds);
569     return false;
570   }
571 
572   int64_t age = (int64_t)now_ms - (int64_t)timestamp_ms;
573   log_debug("Timestamp validation passed (age: %lld ms, window: %u seconds)", (long long)age, window_seconds);
574   return true;
575 }






References log_debug, log_warn, and
    time_get_realtime_ns().






asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_create (const
  uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t
  capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, const uint8_t
  signature[64])


Verify SESSION_CREATE signature. Verifies Ed25519 signature
    matches the message fields.




Parameters


identity_pubkey Ed25519 public key (32 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


capabilities Capabilities bitfield


max_participants Maximum participants


signature Signature to verify (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK if valid, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFY_FAILED if
  invalid


Definition at line 456 of file acds_client.c.


458                                                                           {
459   if (!identity_pubkey || !signature) {
460     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_verify_session_create");
461   }
462 
463   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || capabilities (1 byte) || max_participants (1 byte)
464   uint8_t message[11];
465   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE;
466 
467   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
468   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
469   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
470 
471   message[9] = capabilities;
472   message[10] = max_participants;
473 
474   // Verify using Ed25519
475   if (crypto_sign_verify_detached(signature, message, sizeof(message), identity_pubkey) != 0) {
476     log_warn("SESSION_CREATE signature verification failed");
477     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, "Invalid SESSION_CREATE signature");
478   }
479 
480   log_debug("SESSION_CREATE signature verified successfully");
481   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
482 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, HOST_TO_NET_U64, log_debug,
    log_warn, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE, and
    SET_ERRNO.






asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_join (const
  uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, const char *
  session_string, const uint8_t signature[64])


Verify SESSION_JOIN signature. Verifies Ed25519 signature matches
    the message fields.




Parameters


identity_pubkey Ed25519 public key (32 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


session_string Session string (null-terminated)


signature Signature to verify (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK if valid, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFY_FAILED if
  invalid


Definition at line 519 of file acds_client.c.


520                                                                                                     {
521   if (!identity_pubkey || !session_string || !signature) {
522     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_verify_session_join");
523   }
524 
525   size_t session_len = strlen(session_string);
526   if (session_len > 48) {
527     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long (max 48 chars)");
528   }
529 
530   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || session_string (variable length)
531   uint8_t message[1 + 8 + 48];
532   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN;
533 
534   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
535   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
536   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
537 
538   // Copy session string (copy exactly session_len bytes, no null terminator in signature)
539   memcpy(&message[9], session_string, session_len);
540 
541   size_t message_len = 9 + session_len;
542 
543   // Verify using Ed25519
544   if (crypto_sign_verify_detached(signature, message, message_len, identity_pubkey) != 0) {
545     log_warn("SESSION_JOIN signature verification failed");
546     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, "Invalid SESSION_JOIN signature");
547   }
548 
549   log_debug("SESSION_JOIN signature verified successfully");
550   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
551 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION,
